description_long: This is a compact, single-story urban house with a flat roof and a modern, minimalist design. The exterior features a combination of light tan brick and white plaster walls, with large black-framed windows providing ample natural light to the interior. The house includes a small balcony at the main entrance, accessible via a glass door, and several rooms are visible through the windows, including a bedroom, living area, and kitchen. The layout is open and efficient, with interior walls dividing the space into functional zones. The windows are arranged in both single and double configurations, contributing to a contemporary aesthetic. The overall structure is solid and geometric, with clean lines and a focus on practicality.
description: A modern, single-story house with tan brick and white plaster walls, large black-framed windows, and a flat roof. Features include a small balcony entry and an open, efficient interior layout.
description_view_0: Shows the rear and side of the house with white plaster walls and several windows, revealing the interior layout.
description_view_1: Displays the side and partial front with large black-framed windows, exposing the bedroom and living area.
description_view_2: Highlights the main entrance with a glass door, balcony, and symmetrical window arrangement on the front facade.
description_view_3: Presents the opposite side with more white plaster walls and a view into the kitchen and dining area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a glass door opening onto a small black metal balcony, with no steps or porch, emphasizing a clean, minimalist look.
